name: claude-craft
description: Family-bundled Claude Code extensions: GAS tooling, project wiki, review/research bench, planning, async workflow, slides, and domain-specific bundles.

plugins.name: gas-suite
plugins.description: Google Apps Script review, debugging, planning, sidebar testing, Gmail Cards.

plugins.name: wiki-suite
plugins.description: Project LLM wiki: ingest, query, process queue, lint, plus proactive research hook.

plugins.name: review-suite
plugins.description: Plan review, code review (Adversarial Auditor), iterative review-fix loop, security/red-team review, memory audits.

plugins.name: review-bench
plugins.description: Prompt/question A/B benchmarking and ablation tooling. Depends on review-suite.

plugins.name: planning-suite
plugins.description: Architect, refactor, test, schedule-plan-tasks, node-plan, alias/unalias, performance, knowledge.

plugins.name: async-suite
plugins.description: Background task workflow: bg / todo / todo-cleanup + task-persist + feedback ingestion.

plugins.name: slides-suite
plugins.description: Generate reveal.js or Google Slides decks from material.

plugins.name: plan-red-team
plugins.description: Iterative red-team plan review with Opus orchestration.

plugins.name: local-classifier
plugins.description: Local Ollama-powered prompt classifier UserPromptSubmit hook.

plugins.name: c-thru
plugins.description: Router/proxy for Ollama / OpenRouter / Bedrock / Vertex / Gemini / LiteLLM behind the Claude Code CLI. Adds /c-thru-status, /cplan, agentic plan/wave skill, and proxy-health hooks.
